data.title: SEGG Media Launches ATM Equity Offering Agreement
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

SEGG Media ( (SEGG) ) has provided an update.

On February 18, 2026, Sports Entertainment Gaming Global Corporation entered into a Common Stock Equity Distribution Agreement with Dawson James Securities, Inc. to conduct an at-the-market offering of up to $5,572,584 of its common stock under an effective Form S-3 shelf registration. Dawson James will act as sales agent for the NASDAQ-listed company, earning a 3% commission on gross proceeds, while both parties retain the right to suspend or terminate sales and have agreed to customary indemnification, compliance covenants, and expense reimbursements.

The company is not obligated to sell any shares and remains subject to Form S-3 General Instruction I.B.6 limitations, with the current prospectus supplement dated January 9, 2026, covering the $5,572,584 capacity and any increase requiring an additional supplement. Net proceeds from any stock sales are earmarked for working capital, potential acquisitions, and general corporate purposes, giving the company flexible financing options that could support expansion and liquidity without immediately committing to a fixed capital raise.

The most recent analyst rating on (SEGG) stock is a Buy with a $15.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SEGG Media stock, see the SEGG Stock Forecast page.

More about SEGG Media

Sports Entertainment Gaming Global Corporation operates in the sports entertainment and gaming sector, focusing on delivering gaming-related products and services to a broad consumer market. The company’s shares are listed on The NASDAQ Global Market, providing it with access to public equity capital to support working capital needs, acquisitions, and general corporate purposes.

Average Trading Volume: 11,206,799

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $18.71M

data.title: Chariot raises up to $24m to back Angola oil acquisition and enter production
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Chariot Oil & Gas ( (GB:CHAR) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Chariot plans to provide acquisition funding for Etu Energias’ purchase of interests in Angola’s offshore Blocks 14 and 14K, gaining economic exposure equivalent to up to 4,000 barrels per day from assets producing about 8,000 barrels per day. To part-finance the deal, the AIM-listed group is raising roughly $20 million via a placing and subscription, plus up to $4 million through an open offer at 1.4 pence per share, with attached warrants exercisable at 2.4 pence.

Shell Trading will support the transaction with up to $170 million of acquisition financing in exchange for future offtake barrels, underscoring the appeal of Angola’s mature offshore fields. Management describes the move as a strategic shift that introduces cash-generative production into Chariot’s portfolio, broadens its upstream value chain, and marks a first step into Angola’s oil sector, though the fundraising and deal remain subject to shareholder approval and admission of new shares to AIM.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:CHAR) stock is a Hold with a £1.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Chariot Oil & Gas stock, see the GB:CHAR Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GB:CHAR Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GB:CHAR is a Neutral.

Chariot Oil & Gas’s overall stock score reflects significant financial challenges and bearish technical indicators. However, strategic corporate events, including partnerships and a shift towards renewable energy, offer potential for future improvement. The company’s valuation remains unattractive due to ongoing losses.

To see Spark’s full report on GB:CHAR stock, click here.

More about Chariot Oil & Gas

Chariot Limited is an Africa-focused energy group with two core divisions spanning upstream oil and gas and renewable power. Its upstream portfolio includes assets in Angola, Morocco and Namibia, targeting both production and exploration, while its renewables arm develops and trades power in South Africa and advances mining-related projects and green hydrogen in Mauritania.

data.title: Savara Advances Pediatric aPAP Trial With Inhaled Molgramostim, Extending Its Rare Lung Disease Reach
data.description:
Savara (SVRA) announced an update on their ongoing clinical study.

President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Savara Inc. is running a Phase 3 study called “An Open-label, Multicenter Clinical Study to Evaluate the Efficacy and Safety of Inhaled Molgramostim in Pediatric Participants With Autoimmune Pulmonary Alveolar Proteinosis (aPAP).” The study tracks how well children with this rare lung disease respond to inhaled treatment, with a focus on breathing, activity, and safety over one year.

The only treatment in this trial is inhaled molgramostim, a drug delivered by nebulizer once a day. It is designed to help clear protein build-up in the lungs and improve how well children with aPAP can breathe and function day to day.

The trial is interventional and open-label, meaning all enrolled children get molgramostim and there is no placebo group. It uses a single-group design with no blinding, and the main goal is treatment, so results will show real-world use rather than a head-to-head comparison.

The study was first submitted on May 22, 2024, marking the formal launch of this pediatric program. The record was last updated on Feb. 17, 2026, showing that the plan and recruitment status are current while the trial is still in progress.

For investors, this update supports Savara’s push to build a franchise in rare lung diseases, adding a pediatric angle that could expand the long-term market if data are positive. Progress in aPAP also helps defend Savara’s position against larger respiratory players and could improve sentiment toward SVRA as investors look for de-risking milestones and potential label expansion.

The study is ongoing and recently updated, with more details available on the ClinicalTrials.gov portal under NCT06431776.

To learn more about SVRA’s potential, visit the Savara drug pipeline page.

data.title: Ferrari Board Proposes 21% Higher €3.615 Dividend for 2025 Results
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

The latest announcement is out from Ferrari ( (IT:RACE) ).

Ferrari N.V. announced on February 19, 2026 that its Board of Directors will propose a cash dividend of €3.615 per common share, about 21% higher than the prior year and totaling roughly €640 million. The move underscores Ferrari’s capacity and willingness to increase shareholder returns, reinforcing its positioning as a cash‑generative luxury car maker with a progressively rising payout.

The dividend proposal is subject to approval at the Annual General Meeting scheduled for April 15, 2026, after which the stock is expected to trade ex‑dividend on April 20 in Milan and April 21 in New York, with payment slated for May 5, 2026. These proposed dates, if confirmed by shareholders, give investors clear visibility on the timing of the distribution and may influence trading dynamics around the record and ex‑dividend dates.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:RACE) stock is a Buy with a EUR438.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ferrari stock, see the IT:RACE Stock Forecast page.

More about Ferrari

Ferrari N.V., listed on NYSE and Euronext Milan under the ticker RACE, is a luxury automotive manufacturer based in Maranello, Italy, renowned for high‑performance sports cars and racing heritage. The company targets the global ultra‑premium segment, combining exclusivity, strong brand equity and disciplined capital returns to shareholders.

data.title: Pozzi Milano Heads to Dubai to Court Global Investors at Integrae SIM Financial Gala
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Pozzi Milano S.P.A. ( (IT:POZ) ) has issued an announcement.

Pozzi Milano S.p.A., an Italian table art and table fashion specialist listed on Euronext Growth Milan, designs and markets mid-to-high range themed tableware, gifts, and home décor through brands including EasyLife, Pozzi, Castello Pozzi, WD Lifestyle, and the recently integrated Mascagni Casa, supported by outsourced production and an internal creative team. Its expansion into home décor and European distribution, notably via the acquisition of French agent Venditio SAS, underpins a strategy of broadening its footprint in lifestyle and dining-related products.

The company announced it will participate in Integrae SIM’s “Financial Gala” in Dubai on 26 February 2026, an investor event aimed at showcasing high-growth Italian SMEs listed on Euronext Growth Milan to the UAE financial community. Chairman Diego Toscani will represent Pozzi Milano, using the forum to engage local stakeholders and promote the group’s growth story, with the event now added to its corporate calendar and its institutional presentation to be published on its website and Borsa Italiana’s platform on the day, signaling an active push to raise its international profile and attract new investors.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:POZ) stock is a Buy with a EUR1.25 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Pozzi Milano S.P.A. stock, see the IT:POZ Stock Forecast page.

More about Pozzi Milano S.P.A.

Pozzi Milano S.p.A., based in Monticelli Brusati and listed on Euronext Growth Milan, operates in the table art and table fashion sector, creating medium-high level themed tableware and gift collections under its core EasyLife brand. Through subsidiary Pozzi Brand Diffusion it also manages the Pozzi and Castello Pozzi brands via licensing, distributes the WD Lifestyle brand internationally, and has recently expanded into home décor and European tableware distribution through the acquisitions of Mascagni Casa and French master agent Venditio SAS.

The company outsources production to a consolidated supplier network across China, Europe, and Italy, relying on an internal creative team to continuously launch new collections and bring fashion-driven, trend-focused products to the tableware and home décor market in an accessible way.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: €18.19M

data.title: Alamos Gold Refiles 2025 Financial Statements to Correct Audit Opinion Error
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Alamos Gold ( (TSE:AGI) ) has provided an announcement.

On February 19, 2026, Alamos Gold announced it had refiled its consolidated financial statements for the years ended December 31, 2025 and 2024 on SEDAR+ and EDGAR. The refiling was made to correct administrative errors in the audit opinion attached to the statements, and the company emphasized that there are no changes to its reported 2025 financial results, suggesting limited operational or financial impact for investors.

The move underscores Alamos Gold’s effort to maintain accurate disclosure and compliance in its financial reporting. By clarifying that the adjustments are purely administrative, the company is seeking to reassure stakeholders that its underlying performance and previously communicated financial metrics for 2025 remain intact.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:AGI) stock is a Buy with a C$60.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Alamos Gold stock, see the TSE:AGI Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Silverco Raises $62.5 Million to Fund Cusi Restart and Expansion
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Quetzal Copper Corp ( (TSE:SICO) ) is now available.

Silverco Mining Ltd. has closed a $62.5 million bought-deal equity financing led by Velocity Capital Partners and Desjardins Securities, issuing 4 million common shares and 1 million units at $12.50 each. Each unit includes a share and a quarter warrant exercisable at $18.00, and insider Eric Sprott contributed a lead order of $10 million, with total insider participation of $11.225 million.

Management said the financing strengthens the balance sheet ahead of the planned Nuevo Silver acquisition and the restart of operations at the Cusi project, marking a strategic shift toward becoming a larger silver producer. Proceeds will fund exploration, evaluation and restart work at Cusi, along with general corporate purposes, while parts of the offering are subject to resale restrictions and final TSX Venture Exchange approval.

More about Quetzal Copper Corp

Silverco Mining Ltd. is a Canadian mining company focused on silver production and development. The company is advancing its Cusi silver project and pursuing the acquisition of Nuevo Silver, positioning itself to become a more significant player in the silver mining sector.

Average Trading Volume: 129,568

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: B2 Impact Lists EUR 300 Million Bond on Euronext Oslo Børs
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

B2Holding ASA ( (GB:0RIT) ) just unveiled an announcement.

B2 Impact ASA, a major pan-European debt management firm headquartered in Oslo and listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange under ticker B2I, specializes in ethical and transparent handling of non-performing loans, helping banks and other lenders reduce balance sheet risk and improve financial stability. The company employs around 1,430 staff across Europe and positions itself as a key liquidity provider to financial institutions through its debt purchase and servicing activities.

The company announced that its EUR 300 million senior unsecured bond, previously placed and tapped in 2025 and 2026, will be listed on Euronext Oslo Børs on 20 February 2026 under ISIN NO0013648998. With the base prospectus now approved by the Norwegian Financial Supervisory Authority, the listing is set to broaden B2 Impact’s access to capital markets and potentially enhance funding flexibility for its continued growth in the European debt management sector.

More about B2Holding ASA

B2 Impact ASA is a leading pan-European debt management company that focuses on buying and managing defaulted loans, providing liquidity to financial institutions and supporting a healthier financial system. Founded in 2011 and headquartered in Oslo, the group employs about 1,430 people and is listed on the Oslo Stock Exchange under the ticker B2I.

data.title: TechForce Secures Beer Bot IP to Accelerate Robotics
data.description:
President's Day Sale - 70% Off

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from NightFood Holdings ( (NGTF) ).

On February 17, 2026, Nightfood Holdings’ subsidiary TechForce Robotics acquired all pre-existing intellectual property associated with the Beer Bot and BIM-E autonomous beverage robotics platform from inventor Christopher Erpelding, in exchange for 7,000,000 restricted common shares. The deal consolidates patents, software, AI models, firmware, engineering documentation, and trade secrets under company ownership, providing a clear chain of title for commercialization and regulatory compliance.

Concurrently, TechForce signed Erpelding as Chief Mechatronics Architect on a $100,000 annual salary with performance-based equity-linked incentives tied to trailing twelve-month revenue milestones of up to $50 million and a maximum of 100,000,000 warrants. Following BIM-E’s debut at CES 2026 in Las Vegas and heightened industry engagement, management reported it is ramping manufacturing readiness, expanding engineering and robotics teams, recruiting specialized AI and automation talent, and evaluating further strategic technology acquisitions and merger opportunities to scale operations and strengthen its market position in autonomous beverage robotics.

More about NightFood Holdings

Nightfood Holdings, Inc., doing business as TechForce Robotics, is an emerging robotics company focused on deploying AI-enhanced automation across multiple industries. The company is initially targeting the hospitality sector with a Robotics-as-a-Service platform designed to handle repetitive, labor-intensive, and operationally constrained tasks.

Nightfood’s long-term strategy is to expand its scalable robotics solutions into additional verticals that require similar automation capabilities. The company aims to improve efficiency, reliability, and revenue generation for its clients through advanced robotics and AI-driven systems.

Nightfood is listed on the OTCQB under the ticker NGTF and is building its position in the autonomous robotics space. Its BIM-E autonomous beverage robotics platform represents a key pillar of its market entry and commercialization efforts in hospitality-focused automation.

Average Trading Volume: 679,260

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $7.73M
